item.title: Shares fall in Japan, while most Asian markets are shut for Lunar New Year
item.description: European shares have opened higher after a quiet day in Asia, where most markets were closed for Lunar New Year holidays

item.title: India eyes $200B in data center investments as it ramps up its AI hub ambitions
item.description: India is trying to pull in up to $200 billion in investments for data centers as it pushes to become a global AI hub

item.title: Malaysia and Japan plan major cross-border carbon capture project
item.description: Japan wants to ship carbon emissions to Malaysia in a first-of-its-kind project in Southeast Asia for carbon capture and storage

item.title: Grok faces more scrutiny over deepfakes
item.description: X faces a new EU privacy investigation after its Grok chatbot generated nonconsensual deepfake images on the platform

item.title: China grants UK and Canada visa-free entry, raising total to 79 countries
item.description: China is letting British and Canadian citizens enter without a visa as it tries to boost tourism and business
